deliverables: CostEngine v2 with effective_date pricing lookup
Batch insert + fingerprint index + WAL verified

milestones: M3: All 4 CLI commands exit 0 on clean data

deliverables: 6 new test files (fingerprint, reconciliation, validator, versioned_pricing, pipeline, stress)
milestones: M4: Zero drift across 3x full scan

tasks.description: Implement FingerprintEngine (fingerprint_engine.py). SHA-256 fingerprint from deterministic field ordering. Dedup check against request_fingerprints DB table. Extend db.py to create request_fingerprints table via idempotent CREATE IF NOT EXISTS.

Extend NormalizedUsageRecord dataclass (connectors/base.py) with 4 new optional fields: fingerprint (str|None=None), tool_tokens (int=0), transcript_offset (int=-1), raw_metadata (dict|None=None). All existing 15 fields unchanged.

Define ITranscriptParser abstract base class. Extend all 4 provider connectors to implement it: add compute_fingerprint(), extract_tool_tokens(), parse_with_fingerprint(). Fingerprint computed pre-normalization from raw payload.
Extend provider_engine.py to invoke FingerprintEngine in parse pipeline. Pass fingerprint to NormalizedUsageRecord. Update parse output to include all 12 common parser schema fields.
Extend IncrementalTranscriptReader (transcript_engine.py) to track and output transcript_offset (byte position) for each line read. Update read_new_lines() return type to yield (line, offset) tuples.
Regression gate: run all 71 FEAT-048 tests. ALL must pass before Phase 2 begins. Block merge if any test fails.

Implement ReconciliationEngine (reconciliation_engine.py) and ReconciliationReport dataclass (8 fields: requests_discovered, requests_parsed, duplicates_ignored, corrupted_transcripts, missing_usage_metadata, reconstructed_usage, estimated_usage, confidence_score). Extend db.py to create reconciliation_reports table.

Extend CostEngine (cost_engine.py) with pricing_version parameter and effective_date range lookup. Add pricing_versions DB table. Update pricing.json schema to include version + effective_date per model entry. Implement historical cost lock: stored cost is immutable unless usage reprice called.

Implement DB performance layer: batch INSERT helper (1000 records/tx), verify WAL mode enabled, add idx_fingerprints_hash and idx_pricing_versions_effective indexes. Implement transcript_offset storage in provider_requests as integer pointer (not BLOB).

Implement UsageValidator (usage_validator.py) with 4 CLI commands: usage validate (checks all constraints), usage reconcile (runs ReconciliationEngine, idempotent), usage doctor (diagnoses issues with suggestions), usage diff (delta between two reconciliation run IDs). Include impossible value detection.
Extend AccuracyBadge CSS (webview.html) with tool_tokens accuracy badge class. Wire per-request badge rendering to accuracy_source field from NormalizedUsageRecord v2.

Add Reconciliation Report collapsible panel to DiagnosticsPanel in webview.html. Implement accuracy % breakdown row (Provider Reported / Derived / Estimated). Add Last Reconciliation timestamp to status bar. Add UPDATE_RECONCILIATION message type and handler in extension.ts. Extend getProviderUsage() to include reconciliation_summary. Run node build.js to sync webviewHtml.ts.

Create full test suite: test_fingerprint_engine.py, test_reconciliation_engine.py, test_usage_validator.py, test_versioned_pricing.py, test_transcript_first_pipeline.py (integration), test_stress_suite.py (100 convs, 10k requests, 3x determinism scan). Extend existing test files: test_db_schema.py (+3 tables), test_normalization.py (+4 fields), test_connectors.py (+ITranscriptParser), test_transcript_performance.py (+10k benchmark).
Full regression gate: run all tests (71 FEAT-048 + all new FEAT-049 tests). Verify AC-01 through AC-07 explicitly. Block release if any test fails.

Write ADR-006_fingerprint_algorithm_selection.md documenting SHA-256 choice, field ordering, pre-normalization decision. Update project-summary.md to add FingerprintEngine, ReconciliationEngine, UsageValidator, CostEngine v2 to Main Modules.

exit_criteria: Phase 1: FingerprintEngine computes stable SHA-256; all 71 FEAT-048 tests pass
Phase 2: ReconciliationEngine deterministic; historical cost lock verified; 3 new DB tables created
Phase 3: All 4 CLI commands exit 0; dashboard % sum = 100%; TypeScript 0 errors
Phase 4: test_stress_suite passes (100 convs, 10k requests, 3x determinism zero drift); AC-01 through AC-07 verified

rollback.trigger: Critical test failure at any regression gate (Task 1.6 or Task 4.2), or non-deterministic ReconciliationEngine output, or extension compile failure
steps: Revert affected phase scripts (fingerprint_engine.py / reconciliation_engine.py / cost_engine.py / extension.ts)
Re-run 71 FEAT-048 tests to confirm stable baseline
For Phase 3 rollback: revert webview.html and extension.ts, rebuild webviewHtml.ts via build.js
